content: GdUnit4Net is the recommended C# testing framework for Godot 4 projects. NuGet: gdUnit4.api 5.0.0, gdUnit4.test.adapter 3.0.0. Tests run without Godot runtime by default (pure C# logic tests) - up to 10x faster. RequireGodotRuntime attribute opt-in for Godot-specific features. Supports dotnet test CLI. Supports Godot 4.3+, .NET 8/9. Alternative: separate csproj classlib with pure xUnit/NUnit for non-Godot logic - works cleanly if no GodotSharp references.
